title: Professionele gebruikssituaties voor InVision
description: Gebruik InVision in professioneel werk voor teaminterface-ontwerp en samenwerking.

useCaseDetails.users: UI/UX designers, product teams, design leads
useCaseDetails.workflow: Collaborative interface design, design system management, handoff to engineering
useCaseDetails.benefits: Real-time collaboration reduces review cycles and improves design-to-dev handoff
